Name: Chevron Tang
Description: This one is a real show-stopper with its intricate dark red zig-zags that look like it is constantly in motion. As they mature, this bright orange-red colour gradually changes to a deep moody purple, but they never lose their feisty attitude or their lightning speed.

Book_info.Habitat_Info: • Oceans|• Shores and Beaches|• Active at all hours
